name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 can artichoke hearts, (14 oz), chopped and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Drain the spinach thoroughly and stir into the onion mixture.
4. Combine the artichoke hearts, Parmesan cheese, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, and lemon juice with the spinach mixture.
5. If using curry powder, add it now and stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Transfer the mixture to a lightly greased 1 quart casserole dish.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes or until bubbly.
8. Serve with tortilla chips.
Yield: 2 cups
